(1) इन िनयम犘 का संि楹玅 नाम िविनधानकता榁 िश楹ा और संर楹ण िनिध 灹ािधकरण (महा灹बंधक और सहायक महा灹बंधक क琉 भत牸, वेतन और सेवा क琉 अ瀈य शत犈 और िनबंधन) संशोधन िनयम 2018 है। (2) ये िनयम राजप灴 म犆 灹काशन क琉 तारीख को 灹वृत होग犆। 2. िविनधानकता榁 िश楹ा और संर楹ण िनिध 灹ािधकरण (महा灹बंधक और सहायक महा灹बंधक क琉 भत牸, वेतन और सेवा क琉 अ瀈य शत犈 और िनबंधन) िनयम 2017 क琉 अनुसूची म犆 सहायक महा灹बंधक आईईपीएफ 灹ािधकरण के पद से संबंिधत, 灙मांक सं榐या 2 के सामने 瀡त瀓भ-12 क琉 灹िवि玗 के 瀡थान पर िन玈िलिखत रखा जाएगा, अथा榁त :- “灹ितिनयुि猴 के िलए चयन सिमित िन玈िलिखत से िमलकर बनेगी :- (i) मु榐य काय榁कारी अिधकारी, िविनधानकता榁 िश楹ा और संर楹ण िनिध 灹ािधकरण, अ瀇य楹। (ii) महा灹बंधक, िविनधानकता榁 िश楹ा और संर楹ण िनिध 灹ािधकरण, सद瀡य। (iii) िनदेशक/उप-सिचव, कारपोरेट काय榁 मं灴ालय, सद瀡य। [फा.सं. 05/19/14-आईईपीएफ] अनुराग अ灡वाल, संयु猴 सिचव -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] 琇ट瀉पण 琇ट瀉पण 琇ट瀉पण 琇ट瀉पण::::---- िविनधानकता榁 िश楹ा और संर楹ण िनिध 灹ािधकरण (महा灹बंधक और सहायक महा灹बंधक क琉 भत牸, वेतन और सेवा क琉 अ瀈य शत犈 और िनबंधन) िनयम 2017, भारत के राजप灴, भाग II, खंड-3, उपखंड (i) म犆 सा.का.िन. सं榐या 46(अ) तारीख 18 जनवरी, 2017 獧ारा 灹कािशत 琈कए गए थे। MINISTRY OF CORPORATE AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 5th December, 2018 G.S.R. 1175(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (7) of section 125 and section 469 of the Companies Act, 2013 (18 of 2013), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules to amend the Investor Education and Protection Fund Authority (Recruitment, Salary and other Terms and Conditions of Service of General Manager and Assistant General Manager) Rules, 2017 1. (1) These rules may be called the Investor Education and Protection Fund Authority (Recruitment, Salary and other Terms and Conditions of Service of General Manager and Assistant General Manager) Amendment Rules, 2018. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Investor Education and Protection Fund Authority (Recruitment, Salary and other Terms and Conditions of Service of General Manager and Assistant General Manager) Rules, 2017, in the Schedule against serial number (2) relating to the post of Assistant General Manager IEPF Authority, in column 12 for the entry, the following shall be submitted, namely :- “The Selection Committee for deputation consists of:- (i) Chief Executive Officer, Investor Education and Protection Fund Authority, Chairman (ii) General Manager, Investor Education and Protection Fund Authority Member (iii) Director/ Deputy Secretary, Ministry of Corporate Affairs member”. [F. No. 05/19/14-IEPF] ANURAG AGARWAL, Jt. Secy. Note:—Investor Education and Protection Fund Authority (Recruitment, Salary and other Terms and Conditions of Service of General Manager and Assistant General Manager) Rules, 2017 were published in the Gazette of India ,Part II section 3 sub section (i) vide number G.S.R 46(E) dated 18th January, 2017.
